reviews.review_msg: She has the knowledge but classes are really boring and unorganised. She thinks she is helping but it makes the topic very difficult in the q workshops and also goes off topic very often.

The most caring and genuine lecturer I have ever had. She wants everyone to succeed and has the biggest heart. I will truly miss being in her class. 
As someone who was never good at math in highschool, Danielle made me feel confident that I could succeed. Take FANX99 with her - you won't regret it. She is such a gem.
The best prof till date for me. Very loving and caring. Teaches super super good and has lots of knowledge about the course. Would love to be in her class every single time i get a chance
